heading: Arbitrators
label: 577 Arbitrators
notes: Amendments1992—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–354, § 3(b)(2)section 587 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “section 573” for “section 583”.Pub. L. 102–354, § 3(b)(3)
amendments: Amendments1992—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–354, § 3(b)(2)section 587 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “section 573” for “section 583”.Pub. L. 102–354, § 3(b)(3)

children.label: a
children.text: The parties to an arbitration proceeding shall be entitled to participate in the selection of the arbitrator.

children.label: b
children.text: The arbitrator shall be a neutral who meets the criteria of .section 573 of this title
